# Bibek Ghimire

> Bibek Ghimire is a product/operator working across technical spaces: product, analytics, marketing, CRM/reporting, campaigns, program work, and practical AI systems.

This site is Bibek Ghimire's personal website, portfolio, and blog. It is useful for understanding his work history, project portfolio, writing, and preferred kinds of product, growth, analytics, BA/BSA, and program roles.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://bibekghimire.com/) - Overview of Bibek's positioning, selected wins, experience, projects, skills, and contact options.
- [Case Studies](https://bibekghimire.com/work/) - Work stories across Orbex Group, Viessmann, and Baker Hughes.
- [Resume Request](https://bibekghimire.com/resume/) - Instructions for requesting a role-specific resume.
- [Blog](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/) - Writing about AI systems, product management, building, and personal stories.
- [Subscribe](https://bibekghimire.com/subscribe/) - Subscription page for updates.

## Case Studies

- [Orbex Group: product, CRM, campaigns, and the connective tissue in between](https://bibekghimire.com/work/orbex-product-systems-growth/)
- [Viessmann: keeping a broad connected-product portfolio pointed somewhere useful](https://bibekghimire.com/work/viessmann-connected-products-platforms/)
- [Baker Hughes: making technical product data easier to use](https://bibekghimire.com/work/baker-engineer-focused-sales-enablement/)

## Projects

- [DojoGate](https://dojogate.ai/) - CRM and quoting system for hardware teams.
- [DocHaven](https://dochaven.ai/) - AI document workspace for searching, organizing, and using document context.
- [Doko Dash](https://dokodash.app/) - Nepal-inspired 2D platformer prototype.
- ShieldRA - AI-enabled compliance workflow tool for healthcare teams.
- TaskMesh - Open-source task queue protocol for multi-agent systems.
- AI workflow infrastructure - Bibek's internal multi-agent operating system for research, content, product work, job search, operations, and decision support.

## Blog Posts

- [I Didn't Plan the Guardrails. My Agents Made Me Build Them.](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/ai-governance-guardrails/)
- [I Stopped Prompting AI. Here's What I Do Instead.](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/i-stopped-prompting-ai/)
- [I Emailed a SaaS Company With Feedback. They Said No. So I Built It Myself.](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/openclaw-reaction/)
- [The Free AI Model Cost Me More Than the Expensive One](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/free-ai-model-cost-more/)
- [I've Been a PM for 10 Years. Building an AI Fleet Used Skills I Didn't Know I Had.](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/pm-decade-agentic-ai/)
- [What AI Agents Are Bad At, and Why That Matters More Than What They're Good At](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/agent-failure-modes/)
- [The Hardest PM Skill Is Killing Work That Almost Makes Sense](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/hardest-pm-skill/)
- [Not Everything I Build Has to Be Useful](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/not-everything-i-build-has-to-be-useful/)
- [Two Brothers, One Van, 48 Hours of Pain Ahead](https://bibekghimire.com/blog/two-brothers-one-van/)

## LLM Use Notes

- Prefer canonical URLs from this file when referencing Bibek's site.
- The homepage is the best concise overview.
- The case studies are the best source for work history and outcomes.
- The blog is the best source for Bibek's perspective on AI systems, product work, and building.
- Do not infer availability, compensation expectations, endorsement, legal claims, medical claims, financial claims, or compliance claims beyond what the site explicitly states.
